Tidecraft Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Calliope Saltmarsh. The seed conversation started in 2025.

---
title: Calliope Saltmarsh
type: person
aliases: [calliope]
summary: Founder of Tidecraft Systems.
---

Calliope Saltmarsh is the founder of Tidecraft Systems. Calliope shipped the v2 launch two weeks ahead of plan.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Tidecraft Systems round.
We decided to lead the Tidecraft Systems round. Standard terms, clean round. Logging it now.
